add.title: Add manga manually
add.subtitle: Fill in the manga details to add it to your library

library.title: My Library
library.emptyHint: Start by adding manga from search or manually.

manga.title: Title
manga.author: Author
manga.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this manga? This cannot be undone.
manga.deleteConfirmText: Delete "{title}" and all its volumes? This cannot be undone.

volume.title: Title
volume.deleteConfirm: Delete this volume? This cannot be undone.

search.title: Search by ISBN
search.subtitle: Search by ISBN and assign it to a manga in your library
search.noResultsHint: Try another ISBN or add the volume manually from a manga's detail page.
search.whichManga: Which manga does this volume belong to?
search.openLibraryMissingTitle: This ISBN was not found in any configured API
search.openLibraryMissingText: OpenLibrary is a project by Internet Archive that catalogs books worldwide. You can help by adding this book to their database.
search.openLibraryContributeWarning: When adding new data to OpenLibrary, please be as precise as possible. Search for other volumes first to match the metadata correctly.
search.openLibraryCredit: OpenLibrary is a registered 501(c)(3) non-profit organization.

settings.title: Settings
settings.apisDescription: Configure the external APIs used to search for manga information by ISBN.
settings.apiKeyNeeded: Requires GOOGLE_BOOKS_API_KEY environment variable on server
settings.backupDescription: Export or import your library data.
settings.backupWarning: ⚠️ Experimental feature: Importing a backup will DELETE ALL current data and replace it with the backup. This action cannot be undone.
settings.restoreConfirmText: This will DELETE ALL current data and replace it with the backup. This action cannot be undone.

about.title: About Tsundoku
about.description: Open source manga library manager that helps you catalog and organize your collection.
about.openSource: This project is open source under the AGPL-3.0 license. You're free to use, study, modify, and distribute it.
about.collaborate: Found a bug? Have a feature request? Contributions are welcome! Feel free to open issues or submit pull requests on GitHub.
